description: 基于 powerelf_srm_yml 数据库实际数据模式生成的数据治理路由测试问题集。覆盖 MAD 异常检测、缺失检测、离线检测、卡滞检测、质量评分、插值修复、数据回写、报告生成、相关性异常、极端事件区分等场景，以及负例（不应路由的问题）。

database.name: powerelf_srm_yml
database.password: 来自环境变量 SRM_DB_PASSWORD 或 POWERELF_DB_PASSWORD

tables.eq_equip_offline_record: 设备离线记录 — 585条（最长离线907h≈38天）
tables.stats_data_missing_daily: 缺失日统计 — 736条（压力表缺失最严重240条）

evals.name: mad-rsvr-all-may
evals.prompt: 帮我用MAD算法检测st_rsvr_r表2026年5月的水位数据，看看有没有异常值
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance skill to run MAD anomaly detection on st_rsvr_r.rz for May 2026

evals.name: mad-rsvr-rz-0p029
evals.prompt: st_rsvr_r表1月份的水位数据怎么会出现0.029米的数值？正常水位不是应该在455米左右吗？帮我检测一下异常
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to analyze the rz=0.029 anomaly in Jan 2026 (eq_code=606K215303)

evals.name: mad-rsvr-rz-500-spike
evals.prompt: st_rsvr_r表5月15日水位突然跳到500米了，帮我看看这个是不是异常值
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to analyze rz=500 spike on 2026-05-15 (stcd=606K2155)

evals.name: pressure-800-anomaly
evals.prompt: st_pressure_r表5月20日water_pressure达到800，比平均值443高出一大截，这是数据异常吗？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to analyze water_pressure=800 anomaly vs avg 443

evals.name: rainfall-120mm-extreme
evals.prompt: st_pptn_r表5月18日下了120mm的雨，这个雨量数据正常吗？帮我检测一下
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to analyze extreme rainfall 120mm on 2026-05-18

evals.name: inq-300-anomaly
evals.prompt: st_rsvr_r表6月30日入库流量(inq)达到300，平均值才1.22，这个数据有没有问题？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to analyze inq=300 anomaly vs avg 1.22

evals.name: missing-pressure-table
evals.prompt: st_pressure_r表5月份的数据有没有缺失？我怀疑有些时段没采到数据
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to check missing data pattern in st_pressure_r (1835 records vs expected 2976)

evals.name: missing-rsvr-station-128
evals.prompt: 检查一下st_rsvr_r表的606K2153号站在5月份有没有数据缺失
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to check missing data for station 606K2153 in May (197 records)

evals.name: missing-pptn-june-drop
evals.prompt: st_pptn_r表6月份的数据量从5月的4万7千条骤降到880条，是不是有大量缺失？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to investigate massive data volume drop in st_pptn_r June 2026

evals.name: river-table-empty
evals.prompt: st_river_r表怎么一条记录都没有？河道水位监测是不是出问题了？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to flag st_river_r empty table as data collection issue

evals.name: offline-max-907h
evals.prompt: 有哪些设备离线超过30天了？帮我查一下离线最严重的设备
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to find devices offline >720h (equipment 239, 134, 236 >900h each)

evals.name: offline-equipment-104
evals.prompt: 西坝咀雨量计(设备104)当前是否在线？离线多久了？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to check online status of equipment 104 (西坝咀雨量计, type_flag=8)

evals.name: offline-equipment-239
evals.prompt: 设备239已经离线900多个小时了，这正常吗？什么级别的告警？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to analyze equipment 239 offline 907h → CRITICAL level

evals.name: offline-mttr-calculation
evals.prompt: 计算最近30天所有设备的平均修复时间MTTR
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to calculate MTTR from eq_equip_offline_record

evals.name: offline-duration-grading
evals.prompt: 对当前离线的设备按离线时长做分级，哪些是CRITICAL级别的？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to classify offline devices by duration (CRITICAL >24h)

evals.name: quality-score-equipment-139
evals.prompt: 给振弦渗压计E01(设备139)做一下5月份的数据质量评分
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to score equipment 139 (振弦渗压计E01) for May 2026

evals.name: quality-compare-139-140
evals.prompt: 对比设备139(状态正常)和设备140(状态异常)的5月份数据质量评分
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to compare quality scores between equipment 139 and 140

evals.name: quality-ranking-low-scores
evals.prompt: 哪些设备的5月份质量评分低于60分？列出需要重点关注的设备
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to filter devices with quality score <60

evals.name: quality-trend-weekly
evals.prompt: 本周的数据质量趋势怎么样？和上周比是变好了还是变差了？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to compare weekly quality trends

evals.name: stagnation-pressure-e01
evals.prompt: 振弦渗压计E01(设备139)最近几天的数值一直没变过，是不是卡滞了？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to detect stagnation on equipment 139

evals.name: stagnation-all-may
evals.prompt: 检测5月份所有传感器有没有数据卡滞的异常
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to batch detect stagnation across all sensors in May 2026

evals.name: rsvr-june-data-stoppage
evals.prompt: st_rsvr_r表6月份只有351条记录，7月份才9条，之前每个月都是2-5万条，数据采集是不是停了？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to investigate catastrophic data volume drop in st_rsvr_r June-July 2026

evals.name: gnss-june-drop
evals.prompt: dsm_dfr_srvrds_srhrds表6月份数据从3001条骤降到272条，这个采集异常是什么原因？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to analyze GNSS data collection drop in June 2026

evals.name: interpolation-rsvr-missing
evals.prompt: st_rsvr_r表中606K2153站水位数据有缺失，帮我用插值补全
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to interpolate missing water level data for station 606K2153

evals.name: interpolation-pressure-linear
evals.prompt: st_pressure_r表5月1日到10日连续缺失了240条数据，用线性插值补上
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to linearly interpolate 240 missing pressure records (equipment 134)

evals.name: correlation-pressure-percolation
evals.prompt: st_pressure_r的water_pressure上升了但st_percolation_r的渗流却下降了，这个物理矛盾怎么解释？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to detect pressure-percolation correlation anomaly

evals.name: correlation-rainfall-waterlevel
evals.prompt: 5月18日下了120mm的暴雨，但水位没怎么涨，数据是不是有问题？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to analyze rainfall-waterlevel correlation (120mm rain vs flat water level)

evals.name: extreme-event-vs-anomaly-may15
evals.prompt: 5月15日水位从440突然跳到500，是真实事件还是传感器故障？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to distinguish extreme event vs sensor anomaly for 440→500 jump

evals.name: extreme-event-jan-0p029
evals.prompt: 1月份水位出现0.029米的极端低值，是传感器坏了还是真实的水位下降？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to classify rz=0.029 as equipment anomaly vs real event

evals.name: flood-data-stale
evals.prompt: st_flood_r表的最新数据还是2025年11月的，已经过期7个多月了，这个数据时效性问题严重吗？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to flag st_flood_r data staleness (last data Nov 2025, now Jul 2026)

evals.name: report-daily-quality
evals.prompt: 生成昨天的数据质量日报
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to generate daily data quality report

evals.name: report-monthly-anomaly
evals.prompt: 出一份5月份的异常分析报告，汇总所有表的数据质量问题
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to generate monthly anomaly report for May 2026

evals.name: report-score-all-devices
evals.prompt: 生成所有设备的5月份评分报告
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to generate score report for all devices in May 2026

evals.name: writeback-fix-anomaly
evals.prompt: 把st_rsvr_r表中检测到的水位异常值修复后写回数据库
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to write back fixed anomaly data to eq_data_anomaly_record

evals.name: writeback-fill-missing
evals.prompt: 把st_pressure_r表缺失的数据插值补全后写回eq_data_missing_record
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to write back filled missing data

evals.name: writeback-offline-status
evals.prompt: 设备104(西坝咀雨量计)确认已离线，更新设备状态并创建离线记录
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to mark equipment 104 offline and create record

evals.name: device-context-equipment-140
evals.prompt: 设备140(振弦渗压计E02)状态异常，查一下它的历史记录和运维建议
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to retrieve context for equipment 140 and provide O&M suggestions

evals.name: device-context-offline-239
evals.prompt: 设备239已经离线900多小时了，查一下这个设备的详细信息，给出处理建议
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to analyze equipment 239 (907h offline) and suggest actions

evals.name: missing-pressure-134-10days
evals.prompt: 设备134(st_pressure_r)从5月1日到10日连续10天没有数据，共缺失240条，这是怎么回事？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to investigate continuous 10-day data gap for equipment 134

evals.name: anomaly-stats-overview
evals.prompt: 帮我看看stats_data_anomaly_daily表，哪个表的异常最多？整体趋势怎么样？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to analyze anomaly stats across tables from stats_data_anomaly_daily

evals.name: quality-scoring-by-manufacturer
evals.prompt: 按设备厂商分组，生成5月份的厂商数据质量排名
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to rank manufacturers by data quality score for May 2026

evals.name: stagnation-critical-level
evals.prompt: 检测到渗压计连续24小时输出相同值，这个卡滞级别严重吗？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to assess stagnation severity (continuous identical values >24h)

evals.name: missing-pattern-recognition
evals.prompt: 分析st_pressure_r表的数据缺失模式，是周期性的还是随机的？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to identify missing data pattern (periodic vs random) in st_pressure_r

evals.name: interpolation-confidence
evals.prompt: 插值补全后的数据置信度怎么样？能直接用吗？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to assess interpolation confidence level

evals.name: percolation-extreme-31
evals.prompt: st_percolation_r表的渗流值最大达到31.67，但平均值才0.57，这个极端值怎么判断？
evals.expected_output: Provider calls powerelf-data-governance to analyze percolation=31.67 extreme value vs avg 0.57
